passing_score_scale: Scaled score (scale varies by state and exam program)
exam_format: Computer-based testing at approved testing centers; online proctored options available for some exams

testing_centers.notes: Most FTCE, CSET, CBEST, TExES, NYSTCE, and MTTC exams are administered through NES (National Evaluation Series) / Pearson VUE testing centers. Online proctored options may be available for some exams.
GACE and PPAT are administered through ETS. edTPA is submitted electronically through the Pearson ePortfolio system.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly. Secondary ID may be required at some testing centers.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted in testing rooms. Calculator policies vary by exam — check the official exam guide. Candidates must agree to testing program terms before registering. Performance assessments (edTPA, PPAT) are submitted electronically and scored by trained raters.
renewal_options: Initial teaching credentials are typically valid for 5 years. Renewal requirements vary by state and typically involve continuing education or professional development credits. Contact the relevant state Department of Education for current renewal requirements.

retake_policy.notes: Standard 30-day waiting period between failed attempts for NES-administered exams. Some states impose additional restrictions — verify with the relevant state DOE. Performance assessment retake policies vary; contact the assessment provider.

official_study_resources.title: NES Exam Preparation Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Free study guides, practice tests, and preparation materials available on the official NES and state exam program websites

official_study_resources.title: GACE Preparation Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Free preparation materials including interactive practice tests available from ETS

aliases: gace content assessment varies by subject
